arts.ttl: No Rob Edwards exit impact expected as Middlesbrough plot next step after Isaiah Jones sale
arts.sum: As the 25-year-old puts the finishing touches to his move though, Luton made the decision to sack Edwards - who had been in the frame for the Boro job when Michael Carrick was ultimately appointed. Despite that, with Luton - like Boro and many other clubs - operating with a recruitment team and coaching team - the decision to sack Edwards is not expected to impact Jones's Boro exit.

arts.ttl: Matthew Hoppe leaves Middlesbrough by mutual consent after difficult spell at the club
arts.sum: Signed in the summer of 2022 from RCD Mallorca, Boro had big hopes for the one-time USA international and Schalke star, but he struggled to make an impact at the Riverside. Matthew Hoppe has left Middlesbrough after agreeing to a mutual termination of his contract after two-and-a-half difficult years at the club.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers' rivals make managerial change after breaking five-year record
arts.sum: Another manager has departed in the Championship after a poor run of results

arts.ttl: Isaiah Jones's Middlesbrough exit moves a step closer as he undergoes Luton Town medical
arts.sum: Coming into the window with their squad at maximum size, Jones's departure will create a gap which could allow Boro to strengthen their own options. Though Jones remained a popular member of the Boro squad and was by no means forced out of the club, he has been allowed to explore the move closer to home after a difficult couple of years on and off the field.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers boss addresses Grant Hanley and Ryan Kent transfer links
arts.sum: The Blackburn Rovers head coach was asked about specific names linked with a transfer move to Ewood Park
